meaning: n.被任命者,[律]指定的财产受益人
examples: This year, is a year that New appointee generation out.
The ruling on April 3rd was unanimous and written by a Republican appointee.
It has turned Bernanke, a Republican and a George W. Bush appointee, into a Republican target.
The Ambassador, a man named Bert Fish, was a patronage appointee and rarely visited the Embassy.
